series_metadata.series_title: All Bidding Documents for Request for Proposals, Contracts, or Similar Documents
series_metadata.series_description: All documents related to the release of a Request for Proposal (RFP) resulting in a contract or Memorandum of Understanding (MOU).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain proposals from unsuccessful bidders for 5 years, then destroy. Retain proposals and resulting agreements from successful bidders for 16 years, then destory., Paper: Trash
